channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists just created exotic new forms of matter that shouldn’t exist
item.description: A new quantum physics study reveals that simply changing a magnetic field over time can unlock entirely new forms of matter that don’t exist under nor...

item.title: The da Vinci bloodline is unlocking the genius’s genetic secrets
item.description: After centuries of mystery, scientists are edging closer to uncovering Leonardo da Vinci’s biological secrets. A massive 30-year effort has mapped his...

item.title: Podcast: Using AI to explore shipwrecks
item.description: Artificial intelligence advancements in machine learning are allowing autonomous exploration in remote underwater environments. Katie Skinner discusse...

item.title: MIT scientists finally reveal the hidden structure of a mysterious high-tech material
item.description: For decades, relaxor ferroelectrics have powered everything from medical ultrasounds to sonar systems, yet their inner atomic structure remained a mys...
